title: BanzaFederationRouting
description: Wire format for cross-operator routing requests and responses. Defines how the originating operator initiates a payment on the destination operator.

minor.description: Amount in currency minor units. MUST be positive. INV-LEDGER-003: integer arithmetic only.

schema_version.description: Always '1' for this routing contract version.

routing_request_id.description: Globally unique idempotency key. Format: rr-<uuid>. MUST be stable across retries. INV-FED-004.

trace_id.description: Causal trace identifier. MUST propagate unchanged across all federation artifacts for a given payment. INV-FED-001.

to_operator_id.description: operator_id of the destination operator. MUST match the receiving operator's operator_id.

sender_wallet_id.description: Wallet ID of the payer on the originating operator.

recipient_identifier.description: Identifier for the payment recipient on the destination operator.

created_at.description: UTC timestamp when the originating operator created this routing request.

certificate_url.description: URL where the destination operator can fetch the originating operator's certificate for bidirectional trust verification.

schema_version.description: Always '1' for this routing contract version.

routing_request_id.description: Echo of the request routing_request_id. MUST be identical. INV-FED-004.

status.description: Routing decision by the destination operator.

trace_id.description: Echo of the request trace_id. MUST be identical. INV-FED-001.

interop_transfer_id.description: Destination operator's internal transfer identifier. Present only when status=accepted. Format: itx-<uuid>.

accepted_at.description: UTC timestamp of acceptance. Present only when status=accepted.

rejection_code.description: Structured rejection code. Present only when status=rejected.

rejection_reason.description: Human-readable rejection explanation (English). Present only when status=rejected.

estimated_completion_at.description: Estimated completion time for async routing. Present only when status=pending.

verification: 1. Fetch originating operator certificate from certificate_url

_rejection_code_registry.recipient_not_found: No wallet matching recipient_identifier on destination operator
_rejection_code_registry.currency_not_supported: Destination operator does not accept amount.currency in cross-operator payments
_rejection_code_registry.amount_below_minimum: Amount is below destination operator's cross-operator minimum
_rejection_code_registry.amount_above_maximum: Amount exceeds destination operator's cross-operator limit
_rejection_code_registry.operator_trust_failure: Destination operator could not verify originating operator's certificate
_rejection_code_registry.capability_unavailable: Destination operator is temporarily unable to accept cross-operator payments
_rejection_code_registry.duplicate_request: routing_request_id already processed with different content (invariant violation by originating operator)

destination_operator_must_reject_if: from_operator_id certificate trust fails (any trust protocol step fails)
Same routing_request_id received with different content (report duplicate_request)

_served_at: POST /federation/route — on the destination operator's interop_endpoint

_certification_evidence.FED-L3-009_010: Bidirectional trust verification via certificate_url in request
_certification_evidence.FED-L3-011: accepted routing request triggers payment completion on destination operator
